title: Cybersecurity revamp risks legal overreach and market fallout [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: CSA2 risks stretching EU powers into geopolitics, with legal and economic consequences that cannot be ignored, warns Clifford Chance lawyer Michel Petite
summary_public: CSA2 risks stretching EU powers into geopolitics, with legal and economic consequences that cannot be ignored, warns Clifford Chance lawyer Michel Petite
